title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Cipla

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Cipla
jsonLd.description:
Cipla has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cipla:
Cipla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
